headline.text: L3 running at *14 mpm* after TG#4 belt shredded — replacement found by 07:10 but not yet installed.

per_plant_summary.L1: Quiet shift with no production issues. New packaging area flagged as needing compressed air for tape machines and box printers.
per_plant_summary.L2: Minor equipment hiccups cleared quickly. Temperature unit and scraper issues on ML2 resolved by 05:47, long belt tracking on ML3 fixed with hard reset by 06:12.
per_plant_summary.L3: Heavy equipment day. TG#4 belt shredded, forcing line speed to 14 mpm; replacement belt located by 07:10. Multiple other issues active at window close: sensor problems after demolding, gondola exit jams, and TG#3 down cutting paper.

notes.text: Forming plate guides were found swapped between ML2 and ML3 during setup.

resolved.title: Temperature unit and scraper fault on ML2
resolved.summary: Temperature unit had problems and scraper faulted during startup, blocking deposition.
resolved.resolution: Mechanics worked on temperature unit, maintenance brought scraper back up, temperatures came down, and line started depositing at 05:47.

resolved.title: Long belts not tracking on ML3
resolved.summary: Long belts on ML3 failed to track properly, requiring maintenance intervention.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance performed hard reset at 06:04; belts tracking and running by 06:12.

resolved.title: Temper unit faulted on depositor 1
resolved.summary: One of the temper units on depositor 1 faulted out, requiring maintenance response.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:59 — "This got resolved at 6:59am" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: Air in ML1 cooling system
resolved.summary: Cooling system pressure dropped below green range, indicating air in the line.
resolved.resolution: Nathan Ruiz bled the air out at 05:59 — "Bled the air out and it's now in the green."

needs_attention.title: New packaging area missing compressed air
needs_attention.summary: New packaging area has no air supply; tape machine and box printers require compressed air to operate.
needs_attention.status: Troy Baxter flagged at 07:08, assuming air can be brought over from adjacent area and dropped in.

needs_attention.title: TG#4 belt shredded, line at reduced speed
needs_attention.summary: TG#4 belt shredded into two pieces due to incorrect operator installation; line running at 14 mpm instead of normal speed.
needs_attention.status: No spare available; Preston Elmer located replacement belt at L2 and picked it up by 07:10, but installation not confirmed by window close.

needs_attention.title: Sensor issues on belts after demolding
needs_attention.summary: One or more sensors on the belts after demolding are malfunctioning, requiring maintenance attention.
needs_attention.status: Nathan Ruiz on-site as of 06:25, no resolution posted.

needs_attention.title: Gondola exit sending double layers, causing jams
needs_attention.summary: Gondola exit is feeding double layers of chocolate, creating jams at the exit point.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 07:08, no resolution or update by window close.

needs_attention.title: TG#3 down, cutting paper
needs_attention.summary: TG#3 flow wrapper is down due to cutting the paper film, blocking that wrapping lane.
needs_attention.status: Nathan Ruiz investigating as of 07:10; team working on alternate wrapper (RW) as temporary workaround.

needs_attention.title: Blank guidance values on operator screens
needs_attention.summary: Many operator guidance values are blank on ML4, making it harder for the team to run to spec.
needs_attention.status: Flagged to Rich Brierley and Shawn Jewkes at 05:25, requested update today; no confirmation of fix.
